entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE

entities.description: A science-based approach integrating multiple models with stakeholder input to generate actionable information

entities.name: AGMIP
entities.description: Agricultural Model Intercomparison and Improvement Project

entities.name: REPRESENTATIVE AGRICULTURAL PATHWAYS
entities.description: Socio-economic scenarios co-developed with stakeholders to portray development pathways

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER ENGAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of involving stakeholders in co-developing scenarios and adaptation strategies

entities.name: IMPACT ASSESSMENT MODELS
entities.description: Models used to simulate outcomes for climate, crop, livestock, and economics

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The country where the dryland farming systems study is conducted

entities.name: DRYLAND AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONE
entities.description: An area characterized by low and erratic rainfall and nutrient depleted soils

entities.name: LOW AND ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: A characteristic of the dryland agro-ecological zone in Zimbabwe

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEPLETED SOILS
entities.description: A characteristic of the dryland agro-ecological zone in Zimbabwe

entities.name: NKAYI DISTRICT
entities.description: A specific district in Western Zimbabwe used for simulation results

entities.name: WESTERN ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The region where Nkayi District is located

entities.name: CATTLE
entities.description: Livestock animals whose herds are threatened by feed shortages

entities.name: FEED SHORTAGES
entities.description: A result of climate change that threatens farms with large cattle herds

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Crops used in diversification strategies to reduce vulnerability

entities.name: DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: An adaptation strategy involving the production of various crops like legumes

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: An adaptation strategy to improve the quality of nutrient depleted soils

entities.name: MARKET ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Economic settings that require investment to support adaptation

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The susceptibility of farmers to climate change impacts

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT SCENARIO
entities.description: A scenario that addresses institutional failures and promotes environmentally sound technologies

entities.name: RAPID ECONOMIC GROWTH PATHWAY
entities.description: A socio-economic scenario focused on quick economic wins from commercializing agriculture

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL FAILURES
entities.description: Systemic failures addressed by the sustainable development scenario

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY-ENHANCING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Environmentally sound technologies promoted under the sustainable development scenario

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGY
entities.description: Plans or actions taken to adjust to climate change impacts
